Uses of Class
io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueueItem

Packages that use FileQueueItem
Package
Description
io.stimulustech.filequeue
FileQueue offers a lightweight, high-performance, simple, reliable, and persistent queue for Java applications.
io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor
 

  • Uses of FileQueueItem in io.stimulustech.filequeue

    Classes in io.stimulustech.filequeue with type parameters of type FileQueueItem
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    FileQueue<T extends FileQueueItem>
    FileQueue is a fast, efficient, persistent queue written in Java and backed by H2 MVStore.
    static final class 
    FileQueue.Config<T extends FileQueueItem>
    Immutable-style configuration builder for FileQueue.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T extends FileQueueItem>
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.config(String queueName, Path queuePath, Class<T> type, Consumer<? super T> consumer, ExecutorService executorService)
    Creates a FileQueue.Config with all mandatory fields set, ready for further customisation via its fluent setter methods.
    static <T extends FileQueueItem>
    FileQueue<T>
    FileQueue.fileQueue()
    Factory method that creates a new, uninitialised FileQueue instance.

  • Uses of FileQueueItem in io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor

    Classes in io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor with type parameters of type FileQueueItem
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    QueueProcessor<T extends FileQueueItem>
    Internal queue processor responsible for dispatching FileQueueItem instances to a Consumer, persisting items that cannot be immediately processed, and retrying them according to the configured delay strategy.
    final class 
    QueueProcessorBuilder<T extends FileQueueItem>
    Builder for constructing a QueueProcessor.
    Methods in io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor with type parameters of type FileQueueItem
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    QueueProcessorBuilder<T1>
    QueueProcessorBuilder.builder(String queueName, Path queuePath, Class<T1> type, Consumer<T1> consumer, ExecutorService executor)
    Creates a pre-populated builder with all mandatory fields set.
